target: 60. 14 Years Ago (1)
May 25th
...Huh?
Shinpei! This is... Western Restaurant Kofune! Even if the starting point of the loop shifted... Were we in a place like this!?
No, something's wrong. The scenery feels off too...!
Hey, wait up! I said wait, Sis!!
...!! That was! Could it be... Nagumo-sensei!?
Thinking about it won't help! Shinpei! Let's chase those two!
Yeah... hm?
(...!! The scene changed!?)
Huh~. It's crowded today!
Oh! Welcome, Hizuru! Ryunosuke!
...!! It really is those two... Hizuru-san and... Her twin brother, <color=#GF_TIPS_036>Ryunosuke</color>-san...!!
Wh-What's going on!?
When I died the first time... Something similar happened...
Welcome! Table for two?
Ah. Why are you wearing an apron? Akemi-san!
Today happens to be Western Restaurant Kofune's 10th anniversary! So everyone on the island is coming to eat!
Is that so! Congratulations!
Thanks~ That's why I'm helping out too!
You're right! It's Akemi-san!! Amazing!!
So this is the past...
(There are flowers for Kofune's 10th anniversary. The date is May 25, 2004— 14 years ago...!!)
The first time I died, Mio was nearby and something like this happened!
I was at the private beach where you died... And I witnessed a past event...
That was Mio's memory...? Then this is... Nagumo-sensei's memory...!?
Western Restaurant Kofune's 10th Anniversary!! Congratulatiooooons!
Oh, Toru! Masahito! Thank you!
Alain... Um... it's always delicious. Please keep... the taste exactly as it is.
Hey, did you look in a mirror!? Your beard! And your bedhead too!
Ah... sorry... I forgot...
Even your dad came! So there was a day like this, huh!
Yeah... it's amazing... they're moving...
What kind of work did your parents do again, Shinpei?
Underwater archaeologists. A job diving in the water.
How have you been lately, Toru-kun?
I'm thinking of diving at that spot I mentioned before...
Oho!
Hitogashima has a lot of history and is interesting... I'm really glad we moved here...
And the food is delicious too!
(Their voices... their gestures... they were just like that...)
Sis. Cheer up already.
Hmph! I shouldn't have told you.
But... You said you made a friend...
What's so strange about that?
Because... it's hard to believe, right? There aren't even 20 students in the whole middle school... Where would you meet someone new?
Mt. Takanosu.
(The scene changed again…!)
Shinpei! This is!
Yeah... the old Hishigata Clinic...
You really met here? Where is she from? A kid from the island!?
Probably.
Probably!?
And... she's probably not from our time.
You'll know when you meet her, she always appears at this time. Over there. She comes down from the second floor.
That's definitely a ghost!! There's a rumor that ghosts appear here!!
She's not coming out...
Shouldn't we go home soon? It'll be dangerous to go back once it gets dark.
I promised to meet her today. I keep my promises.
I'm going home first, okay? Once you're like this, Sis, you won't budge an inch.
(Ryunosuke-san went home first, leaving Sensei behind alone—)
Shinpei... look!
Good evening, Haine.
Welcome to the white beach of Omoto Descending from the distant depths.
The lost whale reflects in your eyes If it takes human form, it is Hiruko-sama.
I'm sorry, Hizuru.
For what?
Even though I'm the one who said I wanted to meet your brother... When the time came...
You don't need to do anything you don't want to.
...As I thought, I'm fine with just you, Hizuru... You're different from the others, Hizuru.
Different? I am?
Everyone gets scared and runs away when they see me, but instead of running, you chased after me.
The ghost of the old ward, it's become a rumor.
*Giggle*... That's why I was told it's bad for us to meet like this.
...By who?
By Shide-sama!
Shide-sama... who's that?
Hmm... it's actually a secret, but I'll tell you a little bit since it's you, Hizuru.
Shide-sama is two people driven by greed! That's why... he has four arms.
Four...? Shide... four hands... paper streamers...
She's talking about <color=#GF_TIPS_011>that four-armed one</color>!!
Hm!
Ah... that's right... I brought it. Here. Mint-flavored breath mints.
Wow! This is it, this is it! Thank you, Hizuru!! I've been wondering what it tastes like!
June 10th
Did we jump to another day?
Shinpei... that kid... Is she really that Haine?
I don't know... But let's see this through... to the end of this memory...
What's wrong, Hizuru?!
I cut my finger a little…
Are you okay?!
I'm fine.
Let me see!
What's wrong? Spacing out like that?
Haine?
Mmm...
Hey... Haine? That tickles...
June 18th
I guess I didn't bring enough snacks today.
I hate being hungry... I hate it...
You've been looking pale lately. Are you eating anything besides my snacks—
…Haine?
The food ran out... A lot of people died of starvation...
The adults who went fishing died... And we couldn't catch fish anymore...
When summer came, my father... my mother... my siblings... Everyone... everyone died... They got so thin and died...
Hizuru. My shadow too...
P-Pet my shadow... too...
Just do it.
…Like this?
Mmm... Fufu...
Your hand... is so warm, Hizuru...
You can feel it through your shadow?
Yeah.
I'll bring more food next time.
...Thank you, Hizuru...
Please stay... my friend forever...
July 7th
(I hear cicadas... It seems summer is here...)
Hey.
Eh?
Are you the Minakata girl...? What are you doing in these bushes!!
I'm walking.
I can see that. I'm saying it's dangerous! There are pit vipers around here!
...Then why are you okay?
I'm not okay! Because it's not okay, I'm... exterminating them like this!!
You're getting in the way of my work!! If you're going to walk, stick to the mountain path!
I wonder where Sis went. Apparently she bought a lot of snacks at Koba Mart.
...Maybe she went to see her friend on Mt. Takanosu?
What should I do... Maybe I'll go check it out...
Ryunosuke-san is trying to go to Mt. Takanosu...!
Looks like it... What should we do now...
Follow Ryunosuke
Worry about Hizuru
Let's follow Ryunosuke-san.
Nagumo-sensei said Ryunosuke-san was killed by Haine.
I don't know what we can do in this situation... But right now, we have to keep an eye on Ryunosuke-san!
Got it, let's go!
This is bad... Where is Nagumo-sensei?
Bad? What do you mean?
Nagumo-sensei said Ryunosuke-san was killed by Haine. If she meant today—
Ryunosuke-san is in danger. Let's go find Sensei!
